title: Regulatory Subpoena Event
description: HERO EVENT (Reversal 3). Emitted by the regulator-tn-doi Integration Service API Workflow when the Tennessee Department of Insurance issues a subpoena for all claim flow records. This event triggers the BAA Boundary Reasoner and spawns 6 stakeholder-parent cases simultaneously in the Regulatory Response stage — the fan-spawn hero moment visible on the Maestro Case canvas at t+150s (simulated Day 30).

source_system.description: The regulator Integration Service API Workflow.

simulated_day.description: Demo timeline day (0–90). Subpoena arrives Day 30 in the narrative.

regulator_id.description: Issuing regulator. Must match vocabulary.stakeholders.regulator id.

template_id.description: Which RegulatorTemplate Data Fabric entity defines the discovery requests.

scope.description: Which providers are covered by the subpoena.

response_deadline_days.description: Calendar days from subpoena receipt to required response. Typically 14.

legal_basis.description: Statutory basis for the subpoena (from RegulatorTemplate.legal_basis). Fictional but plausible.

maestro_trigger_filter_hint.description: Paste this as the Maestro Trigger FilterTree JSON when wiring this event in Slice 010/012. Routes to edge_myTR8u (Vector Isolation → Regulatory Response) AND fires BAA Boundary Analysis task (tNWPCipI7) AND spawns 6 stakeholder-parent cases via case-management tasks in Stage_JM1SVs.
maestro_trigger_filter_hint.canvas_note: This is the HERO MOMENT. Stage_JM1SVs must have 6 case-management task tiles in a horizontal fan (layout.x spaced by ~320px) so all 6 provider spawns are visible simultaneously.
